creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this for your next al fresco dinner! ⤵️

It’s finally outdoor dining season! And we’re so thrilled to see that one of our fave lounges @viewbydusit has a cool new look! 💙

Now, the ambience is cozier. It has vibrant tones, warm rustic vibes, and an IG-worthy spot for Burj Khalifa snaps. The food selection is wonderful - delicious and well-presented Arabic cuisine. It’s a non-alcoholic lounge, but they got great mocktails and healthy smoothies. 

Not to be missed are: 
Wagyu Bresaola and Burrata 
Spicy Tango Prawns
Shish Tawook
Wagyu Pepperoni Flatbread
Double Chocolate Brownie Ice Cream

📍 View by Dusit, @dusitthanidubai 
🕕 6 PM to 1 AM
🥘 Most dishes are at AED 70 onwards - reasonably priced as they are flavorful and in sharing portions! 

Outdoor Lounge • Dubai • Dubai Restaurant • Dubai Hotel • Lady and her Sweet Escapes

transcription.text: I Call me down when I'm spinning
